arts.ttl: Manchester United name XI to face Spurs at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has named his Manchester United team to face Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League. Marcus Rashford returns to the starting side after being dropped to the bench for the goalless draw at Crystal Palace last weekend, in a decision that was criticised following the stalemate at Selhurst Park. Matthijs de Ligt […] The post Manchester United name XI to face Spurs at Old Trafford first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Injury blow sees Harry Maguire miss Man United's clash with Tottenham after he picked up a knock in training
arts.sum: The 31-year-old defender had featured in seven of United's first eight games of the season in all competitions. However, Maguire suffered a knock in training and was therefore unavailable.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho sends Cole Palmer three-word message of approval after four goal showing
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho was in action for Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday, providing an assist in the 4-2 win over Brighton, and took to social media after the game

arts.ttl: Son ruled out as Spurs name XI for Manchester United clash
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have named their starting team for Sunday’s clash at Manchester United with Son Heung-min ruled out. Son was substituted during the 3-0 win over Qarabag in the Europa League on Thursday and has lost his race to feature at Old Trafford. Ange Postecoglou suggested the North Londoners would give the South Korea international […] The post Son ruled out as Spurs name XI for Manchester United clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd set to target ANOTHER Dutch transfer
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is considering a move for another player from the Netherlands, with Manchester United reportedly challenging Bayern Munich to sign a breakout wonderkid of a Dutch legend. And his next target could be Ruben van Bommel, the son of World Cup runner up Mark who has become a regular at left wing for Eredivisie outfit AZ Alkmaar .

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes Marcus Rashford call in Man Utd starting XI vs Spurs
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Tottenham Hotspur to Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon and Red Devils boss Erik ten Hag has made a few bold decisions when it comes to his team selection

arts.ttl: James Maddison and Bruno Fernandes are easy choices in our Man United vs Tottenham COMBINED XI - but which big-money striker gets the nod up front and who lines up on the wings?
arts.sum: Ahead of the showdown at Old Trafford, find out who Mail Sport has included in our starting line-up - with a number of big names missing out.

arts.ttl: Man United vs Tottenham - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Erik ten Hag's side can leapfrog visitors with a win
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester United host Tottenham in Premier League action.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag claims 'restrictions' have stunted progress at Man Utd
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of United's clash with Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday, Ten Hag admitted inconsistency will be natural due to the amount of young players they have recruited in recent years. Erik ten Hag has urged young players at Manchester United to improve quickly, insisting "restrictions" have stunted the progress of his side.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Tottenham dealt brutal injury blow moments before crucial Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to Manchester United on Sunday afternoon but boss Ange Postecoglou is set to be without his captain Son Heung-min who will be on the sidelines at Old Trafford
